title: aphyllon cooperi subsp. latilobum
intro: Aphyllon cooperi subsp. latilobum, also known as California dodder, is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family and is native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties due to its high concentration of alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Aphyllon cooperi subsp. latilobum include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of wounds, infections, and other health conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures by steeping its aerial parts in water or a solvent, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and side effects.
